### Post by edmund3 on 2015-02-23
Greetings!

I have two NIC within my Ubuntu Server (the version is 14.04). One of them is public, eth1 and the private is eth0. I am trying to port forward a specific machine and I dont know how to do it. 

This is my current iptable config. I tried out some commands but didn't work. 

```
# Generated by iptables-save v1.4.21 on Tue Feb 24 01:24:48 2015
*filter
:INPUT ACCEPT [329:31770]
:FORWARD ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [259:39404]
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p tcp -m state --state NEW -m tcp --dport 5060 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 5060 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 4569 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 5036 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 10000:20000 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 2727 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p tcp -m state --state NEW -m tcp --dport 5080 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -p tcp -m state --state NEW -m tcp --dport 3000 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 3000 -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -s 192.168.4.0/24 -i eth1 -o eth0 -m conntrack --ctstate NEW -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -m conntrack --ctstate RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
COMMIT
# Completed on Tue Feb 24 01:24:48 2015
# Generated by iptables-save v1.4.21 on Tue Feb 24 01:24:48 2015
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [1122:130239]
:INPUT ACCEPT [140:15419]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [5:344]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 5060 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:5060
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p udp -m udp --dport 5060 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:5060
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p udp -m udp --dport 4569 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:4569
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p udp -m udp --dport 5036 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:5036
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p udp -m udp --dport 10000:20000 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:10000-20000
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p udp -m udp --dport 2727 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:2727
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 5080 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:5080
-A PREROUTING -s 121.XX.XX.99/32 -i eth1 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 3000 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.155:3000
-A POSTROUTING -o eth0 -j MASQUERADE
COMMIT
# Completed on Tue Feb 24 01:24:48 2015
```

### Post by edmund3 on 2015-02-24
ok so I got the network interchanged. The eth0 is the public address which has the 121.XX.XX.99/32 and the private address has the 192.168.4.4 I changed some of the details and still not working so I turned it off. Any suggestions? 

```

# Generated by iptables-save v1.4.21 on Tue Feb 24 01:24:48 2015
*filter
:INPUT ACCEPT [329:31770]
:FORWARD ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [259:39404]
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p tcp -m state --state NEW -m tcp --dport 5060 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 5060 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 4569 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 5036 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 10000:20000 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p udp -m state --state NEW -m udp --dport 2727 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p tcp -m state --state NEW -m tcp --dport 5080 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth0 -p tcp -m state --state NEW -m tcp --dport 3000 -j ACCEPT


-A FORWARD -s 192.168.4.0/24 -i eth1 -o eth0 -m conntrack --ctstate NEW -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -m conntrack --ctstate RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
COMMIT
# Completed on Tue Feb 24 01:24:48 2015

-A PREROUTING -s 121.97.92.99/32 -i eth0 -p udp -m udp --dport 5060 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.8:5060

-A PREROUTING -s 121.97.92.99/32 -i eth0 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 3000 -j DNAT --to-destination 192.168.4.155:3000
```
